prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4G63T (from the Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution III) with a forged internals build including Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei 272° camshaft kit for high-RPM power delivery. Pair with a Garrett GT35R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 4-2-1 header setup for optimized scavenging.

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the rear axle, upgraded driveshafts with CV joints from a Mitsubishi Pajero (for durability), and a Quaife ATB helical LSD for the front axle to handle increased torque. Replace the stock clutch with a twin-plate ceramic clutch from Spec Stage 4+ with a billet flywheel for aggressive engagement.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valved for the Starwagon’s 2,500kg+ weight), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for the front control arms and rear trailing arms, and a full chassis brace kit from CUSCO including a front strut tower bar, rear strut bar, and a 4-point underbody brace to reduce flex during high-speed cornering.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny-inspired kit (modified for the Starwagon’s unique chassis) with overfenders in carbon fiber, extended side skirts, and a rear diffuser from Varis. Front bumper replacement with a custom aero piece featuring integrated canards and a central splitter for downforce, paired with a carbon fiber hood from Seibon with a functional scoop for the 4G63T’s intercooler.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, bolt-in design with door bars), Recaro Pole Position seats (recliners removed for fixed-back racing ergonomics), and a custom dashboard overlay in carbon fiber with a digital gauge cluster from AIM MXS Strada. Replace the stock steering wheel with a Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede) and add a quick-release hub for safety.

Exterior lighting upgraded to full LED with Hella 500 Series headlights (projector lenses with HID bulbs), custom sequential taillights (inspired by the Mitsubishi Galant VR-4), and a set of Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +25 offset) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (255/40/17) for aggressive stance and grip. Add a custom livery in matte black with red accents, including a roof-mounted GReddy Type-S wing for high-speed stability.
